addReview.title: Add Your
addReview.subtitle: Help other travelers by sharing your Morocco adventure experience. Your honest feedback means a lot to us and future visitors.
addReview.experiencePlaceholder: Tell us about your experience... What did you love most? What made it special? Any tips for future travelers?
addReview.privacyText: Your email address will never be shared publicly or with third parties. We only use it for internal purposes and to contact you if needed. Your review will be reviewed by our team before publication. Only your name and review will be displayed publicly.
addReview.successMessage: Your review has been submitted successfully! It will be reviewed by our team and published once approved. You can check our reviews page later to see it live.

errors.commentMinLength: Review must be at least 10 characters

booking.secondPassengerInfo: Up to 2 people can share one quad. First person pays full price (150 DHS/2hr), second passenger pays only 50 DHS/hr.

map.title: Find

quad-kymco-300.description: Perfect beginner-friendly adventure through Marrakech's stunning desert landscapes. Your complete package includes: hotel pickup & drop-off, traditional Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos, and all safety gear. Automatic transmission makes it easy for first-time riders.

quad-raptor-700.description: Unleash 45 HP of pure adrenaline on Morocco's most challenging terrain. This high-performance sport quad is built for experienced riders seeking the ultimate thrill. All-inclusive package features: hotel transfers, Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos, and full safety equipment. Advanced suspension tackles any terrain.

buggy-polaris-rs1.description: Experience pure performance with this 110 HP single-seat beast designed for aggressive off-road adventures. Your complete adventure includes: hotel pickup & drop-off, traditional Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos to capture every moment, and all safety equipment. Perfect for solo thrill-seekers.

buggy-cfmoto-zforce-1000.description: Share the adventure with this powerful 90 HP V-twin side-by-side buggy. Perfect for couples or friends wanting to experience the desert together. Complete package includes: hotel pickup & drop-off, traditional Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos of your journey, and dual safety harnesses. 2WD/4WD selectable for any terrain.

buggy-canam-maverick.description: Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush with this 200 HP turbocharged beast, perfect for extreme off-road desert adventures. Your all-inclusive package features: hotel pickup & drop-off, traditional Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos to capture your experience, and 4-point safety harnesses. Available in 2-seater for intense rides or 4-seater for sharing the adventure with family.

moto-cross.description: Professional motocross experience on world-class tracks with bikes ranging from 85cc youth models to powerful 450cc racing machines. Perfect for all skill levels from beginners to experts. Your complete package includes: hotel pickup & drop-off, traditional Moroccan breakfast & tea, professional photos of your ride, and full MX gear (helmet, boots, protective gear). Choose your perfect bike and skill level.

discover.title: Explore
discover.subtitle: From Marrakech to Merzouga, Essaouira to Fes. Discover Morocco's best cities and landscapes with premium quad & buggy adventures.

marrakech.title: Marrakech
marrakech.description: Imperial red city with desert dunes, palm groves, and Atlas trails. Perfect base for quad adventures with expert guides. Explore Agafay Desert landscapes, Palmeraie circuits, and mountain trails. Experience authentic Moroccan hospitality with professional quad biking tours. Discover hidden gems near Marrakech with sunset buggy rides and day excursions.

merzouga.title: Merzouga
merzouga.description: Gateway to Sahara's golden Erg Chebbi dunes. Experience Berber culture and epic desert quad expeditions. Navigate massive sand dunes with powerful quad bikes and buggies. Witness magical sunrises and starlit desert nights on unforgettable tours. Combine camel trekking with adrenaline-filled quad adventures in Morocco's Sahara.

essaouira.title: Essaouira
essaouira.description: Atlantic coastal gem with beaches and ancient ramparts. Quad along ocean shores with stunning views. Ride through coastal dunes, eucalyptus forests, and sandy beaches. Experience the perfect blend of sea breeze and adventure sports. Explore UNESCO-listed medina and Mogador Island on guided quad tours.

ouarzazate.title: Ouarzazate
ouarzazate.description: Morocco's Hollywood with cinematic desert landscapes. Ride through film locations and ancient kasbahs. Discover Ait Ben Haddou fortified village and Atlas Studios on quad tours. Experience dramatic valley scenery and pre-Saharan desert terrain. Adventure through famous movie sets and thousand-year-old Berber architecture.

fes.title: Fes
fes.description: Ancient imperial city with medieval medinas. Cultural quad tours through hills and Berber villages. Navigate Middle Atlas mountains with breathtaking panoramic views and cedar forests. Visit traditional pottery villages and artisan workshops on guided excursions. Combine heritage exploration with thrilling quad biking adventures in Morocco's cultural capital.

agadir.title: Agadir
agadir.description: Modern beach resort with coastal dunes. Atlantic shores meet desert adventures in perfect weather. Ride along pristine beaches, Souss-Massa National Park, and argan tree forests. Year-round sunshine perfect for buggy tours and quad biking experiences. Enjoy beach clubs, seafood, and adrenaline sports in Morocco's premier coastal destination.
